caption: A person is crafting on a white wooden surface. They use a white glue pen to apply small dots of adhesive to a light blue square of paper featuring a subtle snowflake pattern. In the first frame, the person holds the pen in their right hand, pressing the tip to the blue paper. As the sequence progresses, the person moves the pen across the paper, adding several more small white dots in a symmetrical arrangement. Their left hand remains steady, holding the edge of the blue paper against the table. To the left of the workspace, a packaged item is partially visible, showing an illustration of a plant and the text "rm heart". The person wears a grey long-sleeved garment on their right arm. The scene remains static in terms of lighting and location, focusing solely on the precise application of the glue dots.
